LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT. GRANT. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFFS IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED AND A SEPARATE JUDGMENT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion To Enforce Settlement.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Counsel for the plaintiffs is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and a separate judgment.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, NOT Reported. =(302/EPS)

Motion To Enforce Settlement
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Continued To Aug-05-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
